channel.title: International Polymer Processing
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Polymer Processing

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Epoxy vitrimers: from essence to utility
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0085

item.title: Tamarind seed powder as filler in polypropylene and its impact on the mechanical and biodegradability of the composites
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0063

item.title: Development and characterization of glass fiber composites impregnated with limestone powder and bagasse fiber
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2023-4427

item.title: Hyaluronic acid/κ-carrageenan films for mupirocin-controlled delivery
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0018

item.title: Temperature field study and numerical computation of carbon fiber epoxy composite materials under unilateral thermal radiation
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0096

item.title: 2D dendritic thermal growth pulsations: diffusion field associated with the transport of heat for application in organic-based systems
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0078

item.title: Influence of different surface textures on wettability of UHMWPE and POM- an experimental study
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0082

item.title: Use of machine learning methods for modelling mechanical parameters of PLA and PLA/native potato starch compound using aging data
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0074

item.title: Influence of the viscosity of polymer melts on the coextrusion process based on wall slip conditions
item.description: Article by Xiaozhen Deng, Tianrong Chen, Bing Xiao, Zhong Ren, Gang Tang, Fang Xu, Xiaoxiao Yan DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0104
